# MakeMyCV

> Free, ATS-clean CV builder designed for the UAE and GCC job market (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah). No sign-up, no paywall, no watermark. Data stays in the user's browser. Built for UAE-specific hiring: a dedicated "UAE Essentials" step covers visa status, nationality, Emirates ID, driving licence, notice period and availability, and every template works with or without a photo (user's choice per application). Templates are tested against the ATS parsers used by UAE banks, telcos, and DIFC firms.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.makemycv.ae/): What MakeMyCV is, who it's for, and why UAE CVs need ATS-clean formatting.
- [Templates](https://www.makemycv.ae/templates): All 10 free CV templates — ATS-Friendly single-column layouts (Classic, ATS Clean, Professional) and design-led sidebar/two-column formats (Executive, Modern, Executive Split, Corporate, Onyx, Sandstone, Professional Photo). Every layout is available with or without a photo.
- [ATS Resume Checker](https://www.makemycv.ae/resume-checker): Free check of whether a CV passes the applicant tracking systems UAE employers use.
- [Build a CV (app)](https://app.makemycv.ae): The free builder tool.

## Free tools
- [UAE Gratuity Calculator](https://www.makemycv.ae/gratuity-calculator): End-of-service gratuity per UAE Labour Law (limited/unlimited contracts, resignation vs termination).
- [Notice Period Calculator](https://www.makemycv.ae/notice-period-calculator): Notice period and last working day under UAE Labour Law.
- [Annual Leave Calculator](https://www.makemycv.ae/annual-leave-calculator): Accrued annual leave days and leave salary in the UAE.
- [UAE CV Examples](https://www.makemycv.ae/cv-examples-uae): Real example CVs by role and industry, formatted for UAE hiring.

## Guides (blog)
- [How UAE Recruiters Judge Your CV in 7 Seconds](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/7-seconds-thats-it): What recruiters scan first and what gets a CV filtered instantly.
- [How to Get a Job in Dubai (2026)](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/how-to-get-a-job-in-dubai-2026): Step-by-step from CV to visa to job portals.
- [Professional Summary Examples for UAE CVs](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/professional-summary-examples-uae-cv): Ready-to-use summary examples by industry.
- [Dubai CV vs Abu Dhabi CV](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/dubai-cv-vs-abu-dhabi-cv): Formatting, tone, and content differences between the two markets.
- [ATS CV Checklist for the UAE](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/ats-cv-checklist-uae): 10-point checklist for passing UAE ATS filters.
- [How to Write a CV as an Expat in the UAE](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/expat-cv-uae-guide): What to add/remove for the UAE market by nationality.
- [CV for Freshers in the UAE](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/cv-for-freshers-uae): Writing a first CV with no experience.
- [How to Make a CV for a Job in UAE (2026)](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/how-to-make-cv-for-job-in-uae): The step-by-step build — sections, visa status, UAE fields, ATS rules.
- [Should Your CV Have a Photo in the UAE?](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/should-cv-have-photo-uae): The UAE photo convention vs Western rules, and ATS-safe placement.
- [CV vs Resume in the UAE](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/cv-vs-resume-uae): Why both terms mean the same 1–2 page document in the UAE.
- [Can ChatGPT Write Your CV?](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/can-chatgpt-write-cv): Where AI helps CV writing and where raw AI output fails UAE screening.
- [How to Make a CV for a Job in Dubai](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/how-to-make-cv-for-job-in-dubai): Dubai-specific tuning — DIFC, free zones, mainland, WhatsApp recruiters.
- [Best CV Writers in UAE](https://www.makemycv.ae/blog/best-cv-writers-uae): Typing centres to executive services — costs, checks, and free alternatives.

- [About MakeMyCV](https://www.makemycv.ae/about): Who built it and why.
